subcategory: Outline button with icon composition support
use_cases: Triggering actions in forms, dialogs, and navigation menus
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action areas
Multi-variant button systems with outline styling
Composed buttons using Radix slot for icon integration
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-styled button component built on Radix UI's Slot for flexible composition. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), with accessibility features including focus-visible ring states and disabled pointer-events. The outline variant creates a minimal, border-based visual style suitable for any industry or platform.
